rulings.Case Title: ROBERT SIMONELLI ET AL VS. BROWNING PROPERTIES, L.L.C. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff David Rodriguez And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 28, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT DIPAK PATEL, 441 O'FARRELL STREET, LLC's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff David Rodriguez And Request For Sanctions transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on May 12, 2017. Discovery motions currently calendared for May 1, 2017 in department 501 are also transferred to Department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on May 12, 2017. Parties to provide courtesy copies of the motion papers to department 301 no later than May 1, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date and department. = (501/REQ)
